Below is the structured data using JSON-LD for the article, along with the meta tags to be used in the webpage. This JSON-LD also includes schema types like Article, Organization, and ImageObject to ensure comprehensive data markup, which can help in search engine optimization.

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta property="og:title" content="The Legendary Treasure Hunt of Sable Cove">
    <meta property="og:description" content="Join the thrilling adventure led by explorer Elara Quinn and her crew as they uncover the hidden treasure of Captain Blackthorn on the mythical isle of Sable Cove. An engaging tale of discovery and camaraderie brought to you by ArtCabbage.">
    <meta property="og:image" content="https://artcabbage.com/assets/treasure_hunt_image.jpg">
    <meta property="og:url" content="https://artcabbage.com/articles/treasure-hunt-sable-cove">
    <meta property="og:type" content="article">
    <meta property="og:site_name" content="ArtCabbage">
    <meta property="fb:app_id" content="195655606875833">
    
    <script type="application/ld+json">
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "Article",
      "headline": "The Legendary Treasure Hunt of Sable Cove",
      "author": {
        "@type": "Organization",
        "name": "ArtCabbage",
        "url": "https://www.artcabbage.com"
      },
      "image": "https://artcabbage.com/assets/treasure_hunt_image.jpg",
      "datePublished": "2023-11-01",
      "publisher": {
        "@type": "Organization",
        "name": "ArtCabbage",
        "url": "https://www.artcabbage.com",
        "logo": {
            "@type": "ImageObject",
            "url": "https://artcabbage.com/assets/artcabbage_logo.png"
        },
        "description": "Discover ArtCabbage: your global platform for all things art! As a hub for art, cinema, literature, fashion, and performing
